description: Used inside write() to specify which parts of the math text to skip or isolate during animation. Takes an ASCII math term and an occurrence index. When used alone, matching parts appear instantly without animation. When combined with type(invert), only the excluded parts are animated.
utility: Select specific terms to skip or isolate animation in write()

arguments.name: pattern
arguments.description: ASCII math term to match in the math text content

arguments.name: index
arguments.description: 1-based occurrence index — which match to target (1 = first, 2 = second, etc.)

alternates.description: Animate everything except the excluded term
Only animate the excluded term (invert mode)

examples.scenario: Exclude second x^2 occurrence in fraction for color highlighting
Exclude first part of distance formula for later reveal
Exclude x^2+1 for separate reveal with offset
Multiple excludes for placeholder variables in where-clause
Exclude entire expression for step-by-step reveal in linear equation
